title: Hermes Agent — Docker
summary: Covers running Hermes Agent itself inside Docker — gateway mode, dashboard, persistent volumes, multi-profile setup, resource limits, and connecting to local inference servers.

env_vars.name: HERMES_DASHBOARD
env_vars.purpose: Set to 1 to launch the dashboard alongside the main command

env_vars.name: HERMES_DASHBOARD_TUI
env_vars.purpose: Set to 1 to expose in-browser Chat tab

env_vars.name: HERMES_UID
env_vars.purpose: Override UID for the hermes user in the container

env_vars.name: HERMES_GID
env_vars.purpose: Override GID for the hermes user in the container

env_vars.name: HERMES_ALLOW_ROOT_GATEWAY
env_vars.purpose: Set to 1 to allow running gateway as root (not recommended)

cli_commands.command: docker run -d --name hermes --restart unless-stopped -v ~/.hermes:/opt/data -p 8642:8642 nousresearch/hermes-agent gateway run

config_keys.description: Base URL for local inference server inside Docker network

code_examples.caption: Run in gateway mode
code_examples.code:
docker run -d \
  --name hermes \
  --restart unless-stopped \
  -v ~/.hermes:/opt/data \
  -p 8642:8642 \
  nousresearch/hermes-agent gateway run

code_examples.caption: Run with dashboard
code_examples.code:
docker run -d \
  --name hermes \
  -v ~/.hermes:/opt/data \
  -p 8642:8642 \
  -p 9119:9119 \
  -e HERMES_DASHBOARD=1 \
  nousresearch/hermes-agent gateway run

code_examples.caption: Docker Compose with dashboard
code_examples.code:
services:
  hermes:
    image: nousresearch/hermes-agent:latest
    container_name: hermes
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: gateway run
    ports:
      - "8642:8642"
      - "9119:9119"
    volumes:
      - ~/.hermes:/opt/data
    environment:
      - HERMES_DASHBOARD=1

code_examples.caption: Connect to local vLLM on same Docker network
code_examples.code:
model:
  provider: custom
  model: my-model
  base_url: http://vllm:8000/v1
  api_key: "none"

code_examples.caption: Upgrade container
code_examples.code:
docker pull nousresearch/hermes-agent:latest
docker rm -f hermes
docker run -d --name hermes --restart unless-stopped -v ~/.hermes:/opt/data nousresearch/hermes-agent gateway run

gotchas: Never run two Hermes gateway containers against the same /opt/data simultaneously — session files are not designed for concurrent write access
Do not override the image entrypoint unless you keep entrypoint.sh in the command chain — it drops privileges to the hermes user
Using Hermes built-in multi-profile feature in Docker is not recommended — use one container per profile instead
On Linux use --network host with 127.0.0.1 for local inference; on macOS/Windows use host.docker.internal
Use container name (not localhost) as hostname when both inference server and Hermes are on the same Docker network
The dashboard side-process is not supervised — if it crashes, it stays down until container restart
full_text:
# Docker

# Hermes Agent — Docker

There are two distinct ways Docker intersects with Hermes Agent:

1. **Running Hermes IN Docker** — the agent itself runs inside a container (this page's primary focus)
2. **Docker as a terminal backend** — the agent runs on your host but executes commands inside a persistent Docker sandbox (see Configuration → Docker Backend)

## Quick start

```sh
mkdir -p ~/.hermes
docker run -it --rm \
  -v ~/.hermes:/opt/data \
  nousresearch/hermes-agent setup
```

## Running in gateway mode

```sh
docker run -d \
  --name hermes \
  --restart unless-stopped \
  -v ~/.hermes:/opt/data \
  -p 8642:8642 \
  nousresearch/hermes-agent gateway run
```

Port 8642 exposes the gateway's OpenAI-compatible API server and health endpoint.

### With API server exposed

```sh
docker run -d \
  --name hermes \
  --restart unless-stopped \
  -v ~/.hermes:/opt/data \
  -p 8642:8642 \
  -e API_SERVER_ENABLED=true \
  -e API_SERVER_HOST=0.0.0.0 \
  -e API_SERVER_KEY=your_api_key_here \
  -e API_SERVER_CORS_ORIGINS='*' \
  nousresearch/hermes-agent gateway run
```

## Running the dashboard

```sh
docker run -d \
  --name hermes \
  --restart unless-stopped \
  -v ~/.hermes:/opt/data \
  -p 8642:8642 \
  -p 9119:9119 \
  -e HERMES_DASHBOARD=1 \
  nousresearch/hermes-agent gateway run
```

| Environment variable | Description | Default |
|---------------------|-------------|---------|
| `HERMES_DASHBOARD` | Set to `1` to launch the dashboard | unset |
| `HERMES_DASHBOARD_HOST` | Dashboard bind address | `0.0.0.0` |
| `HERMES_DASHBOARD_PORT` | Dashboard port | `9119` |
| `HERMES_DASHBOARD_TUI` | Set to `1` to expose in-browser Chat tab | unset |

## Running interactively (CLI chat)

```sh
docker run -it --rm \
  -v ~/.hermes:/opt/data \
  nousresearch/hermes-agent
```

## Persistent volumes

The `/opt/data` volume maps to `~/.hermes/` and contains:

| Path | Contents |
|------|----------|
| `.env` | API keys and secrets |
| `config.yaml` | All Hermes configuration |
| `SOUL.md` | Agent personality/identity |
| `sessions/` | Conversation history |
| `memories/` | Persistent memory store |
| `skills/` | Installed skills |
| `cron/` | Scheduled job definitions |
| `logs/` | Runtime logs |

:::warning
Never run two Hermes gateway containers against the same data directory simultaneously.
:::

## Multi-profile support

Recommended pattern in Docker: **one container per profile**, each bind-mounting its own host directory:

```sh
docker run -d --name hermes-work -v ~/.hermes-work:/opt/data -p 8642:8642 nousresearch/hermes-agent gateway run
docker run -d --name hermes-personal -v ~/.hermes-personal:/opt/data -p 8643:8642 nousresearch/hermes-agent gateway run
```

### Docker Compose for multi-profile

```yaml
services:
  hermes-work:
    image: nousresearch/hermes-agent:latest
    container_name: hermes-work
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: gateway run
    ports:
      - "8642:8642"
    volumes:
      - ~/.hermes-work:/opt/data

  hermes-personal:
    image: nousresearch/hermes-agent:latest
    container_name: hermes-personal
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: gateway run
    ports:
      - "8643:8642"
    volumes:
      - ~/.hermes-personal:/opt/data
```

## Docker Compose example

```yaml
services:
  hermes:
    image: nousresearch/hermes-agent:latest
    container_name: hermes
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: gateway run
    ports:
      - "8642:8642"
      - "9119:9119"
    volumes:
      - ~/.hermes:/opt/data
    environment:
      - HERMES_DASHBOARD=1
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 4G
          cpus: "2.0"
```

## Resource limits

| Resource | Minimum | Recommended |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| Memory | 1 GB | 2–4 GB |
| CPU | 1 core | 2 cores |
| Disk (data volume) | 500 MB | 2+ GB |

Browser automation (Playwright/Chromium) needs at least 2 GB.

## What the Dockerfile does

Based on `debian:13.4`, includes:
- Python 3 with all Hermes dependencies
- Node.js + npm (browser automation, WhatsApp bridge)
- Playwright with Chromium
- ripgrep, ffmpeg, git, tini
- `docker-cli` — agents can drive the host's Docker daemon via socket mount
- `openssh-client` — enables SSH terminal backend from inside container

## Connecting to local inference servers

### Docker Compose (recommended)

```yaml
services:
  vllm:
    image: vllm/vllm-openai:latest
    command: --model Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct --served-model-name my-model --host 0.0.0.0
    networks:
      - hermes-net

  hermes:
    image: nousresearch/hermes-agent:latest
    networks:
      - hermes-net

networks:
  hermes-net:
    driver: bridge
```

```yaml
# config.yaml — use container name as hostname
model:
  provider: custom
  model: my-model
  base_url: http://vllm:8000/v1
  api_key: "none"
```

### Linux host networking

```sh
docker run -d --name hermes --network host -v ~/.hermes:/opt/data nousresearch/hermes-agent gateway run
```

```yaml
model:
  provider: custom
  base_url: http://127.0.0.1:8000/v1
```

### macOS / Windows (host.docker.internal)

```yaml
model:
  provider: custom
  base_url: http://host.docker.internal:8000/v1
```

## Troubleshooting

### Container exits immediately
Check logs: `docker logs hermes`. Common causes: missing .env file, port conflicts.

### "Permission denied" errors
Set `HERMES_UID`/`HERMES_GID` to match your host user, or `chmod -R 755 ~/.hermes`.

### Browser tools not working
Add `--shm-size=1g` to docker run.

### Checking container health
```sh
docker logs --tail 50 hermes
docker run -it --rm nousresearch/hermes-agent:latest version
docker stats hermes
```

## Upgrading

```sh
docker pull nousresearch/hermes-agent:latest
docker rm -f hermes
docker run -d --name hermes --restart unless-stopped -v ~/.hermes:/opt/data nousresearch/hermes-agent gateway run
```

Or with Docker Compose: `docker compose pull && docker compose up -d`
